# substitution

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/substitution`

Package substitution implements semantic fixture substitution (CONTEXT
POOL-06/POOL-07/POOL-08, D-14/D-16): BuildSubstitutionPlan diffs two
canonical fixture.FixtureDefinition capability sets by CapabilityType --
never by raw DMX channel position -- and reuses pool.BuildImpactPlan's
dependent walk plus pool's proven integrity, freshness, and atomic-apply
gates verbatim rather than a second mechanism. A substitution is always
a one-to-one Add/Remove pair against the target fixture's own
content-addressed identity, never a partial per-item edit.
